message:
feat(freeze): Convert private_symbol opcode to Zig

private_symbol opcode creates a private symbol for private class fields.

Stack effect: [] -> [private_symbol]

Implementation:
- Creates JSAtom from atom string using JS_NewAtomLen
- Converts atom to private symbol with JS_NewSymbolFromAtom
- Frees the atom immediately after use
- Falls back to JS_UNDEFINED if atom not found

Zig-specific changes:
- Uses qjs. prefix for all QuickJS functions
- stack[@intCast(sp)] = value; sp += 1 for push
- const atom/sym for Zig vs JSAtom/JSValue for C
- Proper cleanup with qjs.JS_FreeAtom

This enables private class field support in frozen functions.
